detect.predict.instructions: Examine the supplied passage and determine whether it is more likely AI-generated or human-written. Base the decision on textual evidence such as formulaic structure, repetitive phrasing, generic transitions, unnatural consistency, unsupported generalities, stylistic irregularities, and signs of personal or context-specific expression. Do not treat polished grammar or the passage’s subject matter alone as evidence of AI authorship. Even if the evidence is uncertain, select the more likely origin. Respond with exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`.
detect.predict.signature:
StringSignature(text -> reasoning, is_ai
    instructions='Examine the supplied passage and determine whether it is more likely AI-generated or human-written. Base the decision on textual evidence such as formulaic structure, repetitive phrasing, generic transitions, unnatural consistency, unsupported generalities, stylistic irregularities, and signs of personal or context-specific expression. Do not treat polished grammar or the passage’s subject matter alone as evidence of AI authorship. Even if the evidence is uncertain, select the more likely origin. Respond with exactly one label: `AI-generated` or `Human-written`.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'Passage to classify', '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:'})
    reasoning = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': '${reasoning}', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Reasoning:'})
    is_ai = Field(annotation=bool required=True json_schema_extra={'desc': 'True for AI-generated text; otherwise False', '__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Classification:'})
)

fields.name: is_ai
fields.description: True for AI-generated text; otherwise False
